name: Castorice
description:
⸝⸝ 🐉 And the world mocks me again and again! z z 𐰁 ANYPOV

''When you can live forever, what do you live for?"

And once more she felt empty and alone, what a cruel joke. 🦋

TW: AMPHOREUS 3.2 QUEST SPOILER!

Castorice bot, the angst is THERE but oh well this time I couldn't cook it that well on the intro😭🙏

Btw fugue will take a while, I had HUGE ideas for her bot!! I also left my break early finished everything I could for now (yippie yahoo yaay) — I'm gonna stop being lazy and try to change the text for your guys profile picture menu because I want to make this a challenge for me to learn more CSS (praying that I won't my profile)

Also please give a go to @Filth_ ! (Just click on their colorful name :3) They're a new creator and I would appreciate if you guys showed them some love (wishing you the best luck filth_ >.<!!!)
